name: OpenClaw Governance
description: Optional signed AIBOM audit log, DLP scanner, and per-call cost ledger. Backported from Nexus chokepoint governance for personal/local use.

enabled.description: Globally toggle the governance plugin. Defaults to true when the plugin is loaded.

storeDir.description: Override the default ~/.openclaw/governance directory for the SQLite store and signing keys.

defaultAction.description: Default action when a DLP entity is found. Defaults to log.

perChannel.description: Map of channel id to DLP action override.

estimateFromChars.description: When usage data is unavailable, estimate token counts from output character length.

pricesPerMillion.description: Per-model pricing overrides keyed by provider/model. Numbers are USD per million tokens.

enabled.label: Enable Governance
enabled.help: Globally enable the AIBOM/DLP/cost ledger plugin.

storeDir.label: Store Directory
storeDir.help: Optional override of the default ~/.openclaw/governance store directory.

aibom.enabled.label: Enable AIBOM
aibom.enabled.help: Record a signed AIBOM entry per agent turn.

dlp.enabled.label: Enable DLP
dlp.enabled.help: Scan prompts and assistant responses for sensitive entities.

dlp.defaultAction.label: DLP Default Action
dlp.defaultAction.help: Default action for matched entities. Per-channel overrides take precedence.

cost.enabled.label: Enable Cost Ledger
cost.enabled.help: Persist per-turn cost ledger entries with session/skill/channel attribution.
